message:
test(core): add cleanup-stack integration tests and obligation unit tests

skeleton_test.c:
- Add region_drain_calls_cleanup test verifying that region drain
  invokes cleanup handlers registered via asx_cleanup_push()
- Add region_drain_cleanup_lifo_order test asserting LIFO execution
  order of cleanup handlers (30, 20, 10 for push order 10, 20, 30)
- Include runtime_internal.h to access region slot cleanup stack
  directly from tests

test_obligation.c (new):
- Unit test suite for the obligation arena and lifecycle API
- Tests reserve/commit/abort state transitions, boundary conditions,
  and error paths (e.g., reserve in closed region, double-commit)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
